arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the VPC Lattice service.

auth_type.description: The type of authentication used by the VPC Lattice service.

certificate_arn.description: The ARN of the certificate associated with the VPC Lattice service's custom domain.

custom_domain_name.description: The custom domain name configured for the VPC Lattice service.

dns_entry.description: DNS entries for the VPC Lattice service, including domain name and hosted zone ID.

id.description: The unique identifier for the VPC Lattice service.

name.description: The name of the VPC Lattice service.

service_identifier.description: The service identifier for the VPC Lattice service.

status.description: The current status of the VPC Lattice service.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the VPC Lattice service.
